description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

market_regime.label: BLOCKADE_ESCALATION

framework_updates_implemented.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
framework_updates_implemented.rule: For any 3-outcome binary forecast, include explicit REVERSAL TRIGGER: 'If best-case materializes → regime flips, index +2-4%'. Do not rely on probability weighting alone.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Before making defense stock predictions, model the DURATION of tension. 2-6 weeks managed tension = HOLD/ADD defense. Instant peace = REDUCE defense. Acute escalation = defense spikes then reverses.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Central Bank Calendar Synchronization
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Always check RBI/Fed meeting calendar when forecasting on binary geopolitical event days. Same-day policy decisions can amplify moves by 1-2%.

framework_updates_implemented.name: FII Distribution on Geopolitical Relief Rallies
framework_updates_implemented.rule: When Nifty rallies 2%+ on geopolitical positive event AND FII data shows net selling → classify rally as DII-driven, structurally fragile. Assign +20-30% additional probability of reversal within 5 sessions.

prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}} (Monday, April 14, 2026). ISLAMABAD TALKS FAILED — REGIME: TALKS_FAILED_CEASEFIRE_FRAGILE.

FIRST ACTION — Regime check:
- Search 'US Iran ceasefire April 13-14 2026' — is ceasefire still holding?
- Check 'Brent crude price April 14 2026' — did Brent spike overnight?
- If ceasefire still holding: regime = TALKS_FAILED_CEASEFIRE_FRAGILE (current)
- If ceasefire breach confirmed: apply WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN regime immediately

SECOND: P012 and P013 CHECK DATES TODAY
- P013 (INDIGO <₹4,100): WILL SCORE WRONG. Confirm IndiGo price and score WRONG immediately.
- P012 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,050-1,080): Check date TODAY. Defense premium returning on failed talks — upgraded to 55% RIGHT. Confirm April 14 open and close.

THIRD: Market direction assessment
- Expected: Nifty gaps down -1.5 to -2.5% from 24,050 → ~23,500-23,750 range
- Brent expected ~$99-102 (spike on failed talks)
- SETFGOLD expected to rally +1-2% toward ₹129-131
- Defense stocks (Astra Micro) expected +2-4% gap up

FOURTH: Action alerts
- A005 REVISED: DO NOT SELL SETFGOLD. Islamabad talks failed → HOLD through April 22.
- A008: If Astra Micro closes >₹1,040, raise profit trigger to ₹1,070-1,080.

FIFTH: P016, P018, P019, P020 all check April 15 (tomorrow)
- P016 Nifty 23,900-24,100: Likely WRONG if Nifty opens below 23,900 today
- P020 SETFGOLD ₹120-122: WILL SCORE WRONG tomorrow (gold rallying)
- P015 IndiGo >₹4,150: WILL SCORE RIGHT tomorrow (IndiGo at ₹4,486)

CRITICAL NOTE: Do NOT run git commands. sync.sh handles git add/commit/push automatically every 5 minutes on the host machine.
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

FIRST: Read data/next-run-context.json for full context. REGIME: TALKS_FAILED_CEASEFIRE_FRAGILE.

CRITICAL CHECKS FOR THIS EOD RUN (April 14):
1. SCORE P013 (INDIGO <₹4,100) — WILL SCORE WRONG. Update accuracy-meta.json.
2. SCORE P012 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,050-1,080) — CHECK DATE. Confirm April 14 close. Score RIGHT or WRONG.
3. Nifty April 14 close — P016 range (23,900-24,100) intact? P024 direction (23,200-23,700 bearish)?
4. TCS April 14 close — P018 and P022 progress? Recovery toward ₹2,600?
5. SETFGOLD April 14 close — P023 tracking ₹130-134?
6. Brent April 14 — spike above $100? GRM compression for MRPL?
7. FII April 14 provisional — confirmed selling resumption?
8. IRFC April 14 — correction from ₹100.25 started? P026 tracking?
9. A005 REVISED: Confirm HOLD on SETFGOLD (DO NOT execute partial sell).
10. A008: If Astra Micro >₹1,040, raise profit trigger to ₹1,070-1,080.

TOMORROW (April 15): P015 (IndiGo, RIGHT confirmed), P016 (Nifty, LIKELY WRONG), P018 (TCS, LIKELY WRONG), P019 (Adani Ports, LIKELY WRONG), P020 (SETFGOLD, WRONG confirmed) ALL CHECK TOMORROW. Prepare scoring.

CRITICAL NOTE: Do NOT run git commands. sync.sh handles git add/commit/push automatically every 5 minutes on the host machine.
prompt_for_weekly_intelligence:
You are an expert market intelligence agent running the WEEKLY INTELLIGENCE REPORT for Vastav's portfolio.

WORKSPACE: /Users/shreyansh/Desktop/InvestmentIntel/Stock portfolio/
Read data/next-run-context.json first — it contains the full context, framework state, and weekly intelligence instructions in the 'prompt_for_weekly_intelligence' field (if present). Also read data/accuracy-meta.json, data/predictions-all.json, and data/signal-framework.json for the full picture.

YOUR WEEKLY TASKS:
1. Score all predictions that reached their check_date this week — update data/predictions-all.json outcomes
2. Run L2/L3 RCA on any WRONG predictions — update data/accuracy-meta.json
3. Review and evolve the signal framework — promote any pending framework updates in data/signal-framework.json
4. Generate new predictions for the week ahead (P027+) — add to data/predictions-all.json
5. Write the weekly intelligence report to daily-briefings/weekly-YYYY-MM-DD.md
6. Do a full update of data/next-run-context.json with the new week's context, regime, and priority checks

CRITICAL: Do NOT run any git commands. Files you write to the workspace folder are automatically synced to GitHub by sync.sh, which runs every 5 minutes on this machine.
